full_description: Two blocks on the table (red and green). Use {a} to move the red block {A} to the center, then stack the green block {B} on top of {A}.
schema: {A} is the red block, {B} is the green block. {a} is the single arm: move {A} to the center, then stack {B} on {A}.
preference: Num of words should not exceed 20. Degree of detail avg 8.
